summary: Focused remediation for package dependency hygiene, executeRun retry correctness, and /api/trigger window validation.
decisions: Restored package.json and bun.lock to the published smithers-orchestrator semver dependency (^0.26.1) instead of the local file dependency.
Removed the README TODO about waiting for gateway-react bindings because the published 0.26.1 package exports the gateway modules used by the dashboard.
Changed executeRun message selection so retries include messages already assigned to the same run while still excluding messages assigned to other runs.
Kept message reassignment limited to unassigned messages so retries do not steal messages from other runs.
Moved /api/trigger JSON window validation ahead of buildContainer, rate limiting, chat lookup, and triggerSummary so invalid dates and non-positive windows return 400 before DB-backed work.
redBeforeGreen: bunx vitest run test/unit/pipeline-db.test.ts test/unit/auth-routes.test.ts failed before the fix with the retry SQL missing assigned_run_id = $4 and invalid trigger windows returning 200 instead of 400.
The same focused command passed after the implementation changes with 35 tests passing.
environmentBlockers: Could not create a task branch or commit because .git is read-only in the sandbox; git switch -c production-readiness-remediation failed with Operation not permitted.
TEST_DATABASE_URL was unset, so live Postgres integration cases were skipped; bun run test:integration completed with 1 passed file and 2 skipped files.
